nodes.label: Path-Filtered CI Strategy
nodes.rationale: CI is path-filtered so that pushing to apps/mobile/** only triggers mobile-ci, keeping builds isolated per app.

nodes.label: Per-App .gitignore Strategy
nodes.rationale: Each app keeps its own .gitignore; the root .gitignore covers only OS/IDE/secrets to keep concerns separated.
